creator: peter.schuller@infidyne.com
text:
While devel/git only breaks with HTML documentation enabled,
devel/cogito also breaks - but by default, unless you define
NOPORTDOC. Apologies for failing to mention this in the original
submission.

-- 
/ Peter Schuller
